name: UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Linux)
notes: Detects processes that are created on a Linux system and alerts when the process is outside of the golden disk process allowlist.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event QID is one of the following (4750189) Syscall event
when the event matches Syscall ID (custom) is any of 59
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Gold Disk Process Allowlist - Linux - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Linux) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event QID is one of the following (4750189) Syscall event
AND when the event matches Syscall ID (custom) is any of 59
AND NOT when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Gold Disk Process Allowlist - Linux - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Process Executed Outside Gold Disk Allowlist(Linux)
